comments.author: @BirhanuDeyasso
comments.text:
I am an Ethio-Canadian living in beautiful BC, watching from Vancouver.
Ethiopia is composed of 90 ethnic groups containing a total population of over 130 million. 
Please, go to the southern region of Ethiopia, and visit the only top-quality world-class Yirgacheffe coffee.

replies.author: @yeshanewrede6520
replies.text: ​@BirhanuDeyassoYou can also find wild coffee in jungle in southern parts of the country!!

replies.author: @BirhanuDeyasso
replies.text: @reallifeincountries The coffee we drink here in North America is rubbish. The coffee is not a direct single-origin coffee from the backyard, but a blend. If you go to the Gedeo zone where Yirgacheffe coffee is grown, you can find thousands of flavours, or cup tastes. You can drink all day and enjoy it.

replies.author: @reallifeincountries
replies.text: Now that is a top-tier recommendation. ☕ I've heard legendary things about Yirgacheffe coffee! As an Ethio-Canadian, do you think the coffee tastes better over there in Ethiopia, or has BC found a way to replicate the magic? Let's settle this.
